wo-firm-factory-tests.title: [S2-3] FirmFactory Test & Fixture Overhaul
wo-firm-factory-tests.instruction_raw: Migrate 20+ test files to use the refactored 'create_firm' in tests/utils/factories.py. Use MockBirthContext and MockFinanceTickContext from tests.utils.mocks to satisfy protocol requirements. Remove any remaining direct 'Simulation' God Object dependencies in firm creation code across the test suite.
